zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert Lee Fisher I於大約1410年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Thomas Fisher19歲，母親Ciecily Goddard15歲。他於1432年與Leticia Joan Corbin在英國英格蘭肯特麥德斯同結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1471年3月4日在英國肯特麥德斯同享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert Lee Fisher I于大约1410年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Thomas Fisher19岁，母亲Ciecily Goddard15岁。他于1432年与Leticia Joan Corbin在英国英格兰肯特麥德斯同结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1471年3月4日在英国肯特麥德斯同享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Lee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of numerous places so called from Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’. In the United States, it is sometimes chosen in honour of the great Confederate general Robert E. Lee ( 1807–70 ). As a girl's name it is commonly used in compounds such as Casey-Lee and Jamie-Lee.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert Lee Fisher I was born about 1410, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Fisher, was 19 and his mother, Ciecily Goddard, was 15. He married Leticia Joan Corbin in 1432, in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 4 March 1471, in Maidstone, Kent, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert Lee Fisher I est né environ 1410, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Fisher, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Ciecily Goddard, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Leticia Joan Corbin en 1432, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1471, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert Lee Fisher I um 1410 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fisher 19 und seine Mutter Ciecily Goddard 15. Er hat 1432 in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom Leticia Joan Corbin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 4. März 1471 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Maidstone, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert Lee Fisher I è nato il circa 1410 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Fisher, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Ciecily Goddard, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Leticia Joan Corbin nel 1432, nel Maidstone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 4 marzo 1471, nel Maidstone, Kent, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Lee Fisher Iが約1410年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Fisherは19歳，母Ciecily Goddardは15歳であった。1432年にイギリスイギリスケントメイドストーンでLeticia Joan Corbinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1471年3月4日にイギリスケントメイドストーンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Lee Fisher I(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fisher(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Ciecily Goddard(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 메이드스톤에서 Leticia Joan Corbin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1471년 3월 4일 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1471, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert Lee Fisher I родился около 1410 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Fisher было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Ciecily Goddard, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Leticia Joan Corbin в 1432 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 4 марта 1471 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert Lee Fisher I nació aproximadamente 1410, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Fisher, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Ciecily Goddard, tenía 15 años. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1471, en Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
